name: Coleslaw 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the cabbage, carrots, onion, and celery finely in a food processor.
2. Add the celery seed and process for another second or two.
3. In a large bowl, combine the chopped vegetables with lime juice, pineapple, and Miracle Whip dressing until well mixed.
From: age1@cornell.edu (Abi Eiger)
